old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-r7h4.13.1","title":"SX1262.cs rxMode and stateLock race in RX path","description":"In SX1262.cs: SendRxEnter(), reader thread, OnPacketReceived callback, and Transmit() SetRx state all access rxMode and irqFlags with inconsistent locking. Some paths use lock(stateLock), others do not. This can cause lost IRQs or incorrect rxMode for PollRx/SetRx one-shot behavior (r7h4.6). Add consistent locking and document the one-shot RX contract. new_value: Fixed all rxMode/stateLock races with consistent locking in SX1262.cs: FinishTransmission, GetStatus (now reports RX mode 0x52), GetIrqStatus reads, SendRx* paths, DispatchMessage. Added rxOneShot flag to implement one-shot RX contract (exit only on packet for PollRx/SetRx finite timeout per r7h4.6; continuous stays in RX). All shared state protected. 3 codereview passes with zero remaining findings. Tests collected successfully.
